codeReview.summary: All required infrastructure is properly implemented and verified. VitePress config includes base path, navigation, collapsible sidebar, and local search. Scripts and workflow are correctly configured. Build succeeds with output to docs/.vitepress/dist/.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The commit ID 7235aee3b5e3d4f36c7dc5f72a8b4f72d84e1b6c is not present in the local git repository. The worker's changes appear to have been incorporated into existing commits (possibly via squash/merge). This doesn't affect functionality but means the commit referenced in the handoff cannot be reviewed via git diff.

summary: Review of vitepress-infrastructure feature completed successfully. All five verification points pass: (1) docs/.vitepress/config.ts exists with proper structure including local search enabled, (2) package.json includes docs:dev, docs:build, docs:preview scripts, (3) .github/workflows/deploy-docs.yml exists with proper build and deploy steps, (4) bun run docs:build succeeds with exit code 0 and outputs to docs/.vitepress/dist/, (5) no blocking issues found. The only minor note is that the commit ID from the handoff is not present in the local repository (changes likely merged into existing commits), but the current implementation is fully functional.
